final:
// // This module implements a Model Predictive Control (MPC) algorithm to compute the control signal based on the current state and a reference input. The control signal is updated every clock cycle.
module mpc_controller(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [7:0] state,
    input wire [7:0] reference,
    output reg [7:0] control_signal
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            control_signal <= 8'b0;
        end else begin
            control_signal <= reference - state; // Simple control law
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a Model Predictive Control (MPC) algorithm to compute the control signal based on the current state and a reference input. The control signal is updated every clock cycle.
